summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.tests; import static org.junit.Assert.assertTrue; import java.util.regex.Pattern; import java.util.regex.Matcher; import org.junit.Test; public class RegexRegressionTest { @Test public void testApprovedPattern() { String regex = "\[(APPROVED|REJECTED|KEPT):([^]]+)\]"; Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile(regex); Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher("[APPROVED:variant123]"); assertTrue(matcher.find()); org.junit.Assert.assertEquals("APPROVED", matcher.group(1)); org.junit.Assert.assertEquals("variant123", matcher.group(2)); } @Test public void testFileTagPattern() { String regex = "\[FILE:([^]]+)\]"; Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile(regex, Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE); Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher("Check [FILE:src/Main.java]");
